name: rustboom-extension
description: Browser extension that completes the Steam → Rust+ companion login redirect for rustboom.gg.

scripts.zip:chrome: node build.js chrome && cd dist-chrome && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path * -DestinationPath ../rustboom-extension-chrome.zip -Force"
scripts.zip:firefox: node build.js firefox && cd dist-firefox && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path * -DestinationPath ../rustboom-extension-firefox.zip -Force"
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => ['dist-chrome', 'dist-firefox', 'rustboom-extension-chrome.zip', 'rustboom-extension-firefox.zip'].forEach(p => fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true })))"
